title: DNS Health
helpOutput:
Usage: dns-health [<options>] <domain>

  Run a comprehensive DNS health check for a domain.

Options:
  --json               Output results in JSON format
  -s, --server=<text>  DNS server to query (default: system resolver)
  -t, --timeout=<int>  Query timeout in seconds
  -h, --help           Show this message and exit

Arguments:
  <domain>  Domain name to check
